name: SSH Communications Security Oyj
summary: SSH Communications Security Oyj provides enterprise cybersecurity solutions for financial institutions and other organizations to access, secure, and control data, applications, and services worldwide. Its products include PrivX that offers lean access management for multi-cloud, containers, and serverless systems; Universal SSH Key Manager for SSH key and certificate management with support for legacy systems and a transition path to the cloud; Tectia SSH that offers Secure file transfer, remote administration, application tunneling, and automation for server environments; and NQX Firewall for the protection of government and other high-security applications. It sells its products directly as well as through online. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Helsinki, Finland.
